description: User interface elements in faction-specific styles - detailed BOTF-inspired frames

federation.name: LCARS
federation.style: Classic Star Trek TNG/DS9/VOY LCARS interface - colorful rounded shapes on black
features: Thick colored bars with rounded ends
Black content areas surrounded by colored frame
federation.reference: Star Trek TNG bridge displays, LCARS terminals

klingon.name: Klingon Empire Interface
klingon.style: Aggressive, dark, battle-worn metal with red accents - inspired by BOTF
klingon.reference: Birth of the Federation Klingon UI, warship interiors

romulan.name: Romulan Star Empire Interface
romulan.style: Elegant, sophisticated, green/emerald with gold/bronze accents - secretive and refined
romulan.reference: Birth of the Federation Romulan UI, Warbird bridge

cardassian.name: Cardassian Union Interface
cardassian.reference: DS9 Cardassian interfaces, Obsidian Order terminals

borg.name: Borg Collective Interface
borg.style: Cold technological horror, green on black, hexagonal patterns

elementTypes.name: Main Panel Frame (800x600)
elementTypes.use: Primary game panel background - system info, diplomacy, etc
elementTypes.prompt_suffix: game UI panel frame, 800x600 resolution, thick frame on left and top, thin frame on right and bottom, large black content area in center for text/buttons, transparent or faction-colored background visible through gaps

elementTypes.name: Sidebar Panel (300x800)
elementTypes.prompt_suffix: vertical sidebar navigation panel, thick decorative frame, slots for 6-8 navigation buttons, faction emblem area, 300x800 resolution

elementTypes.name: Wide Button (200x50)
elementTypes.prompt_suffix: wide clickable button, 200x50 resolution, clear text area, hover state variation

elementTypes.name: Header Bar (800x80)
elementTypes.prompt_suffix: horizontal header bar, title area, decorative elements, 800x80 resolution

elementTypes.name: Corner Accent Top-Left
elementTypes.prompt_suffix: decorative corner accent piece for top-left, 100x100 resolution, faction styling

elementTypes.name: Progress Bar (400x30)
elementTypes.prompt_suffix: horizontal progress bar with fill indicator, 400x30 resolution

elementTypes.name: Alert Box (500x200)
elementTypes.prompt_suffix: alert/warning dialog box, attention-grabbing frame, 500x200 resolution

elementTypes.name: Tooltip Frame (300x150)
elementTypes.prompt_suffix: tooltip popup frame, subtle styling, 300x150 resolution

elementTypes.name: Minimap Frame (200x200)
elementTypes.prompt_suffix: square minimap frame with faction decoration, 200x200 resolution

styleGuide.material: High quality digital render - NOT flat 2D - rich textures and depth
styleGuide.quality: Professional game UI quality, crisp at target resolution
styleGuide.lighting: Subtle ambient lighting, glowing accents for active elements
styleGuide.composition: UI element on black or transparent background
styleGuide.background: Transparent PNG preferred, or black background
critical: BOTF-inspired quality - dramatic, impressive, each faction UNIQUE
Klingon: Battle-worn metal, scratches, rivets, red glow
Romulan: Elegant bronze/green, sweeping curves, refined
Federation/LCARS: Colorful rounded shapes, multi-segment bars
NOT flat 2D clipart - rich textures and lighting

comfyui_settings.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, distorted, watermark, text, 3D render, photorealistic photo, cartoon, anime, childish, flat colors, clipart, simple vector

batch_prompts.klingon_panel_frame: Klingon Empire game UI panel frame, 800x600 resolution, heavy angular gunmetal frame with battle damage scratches and rivets, aggressive spike cutouts along edges, glowing blood-red accent stripes, dark bronze corner spikes, Klingon trefoil emblem in sidebar, red nebula glow visible through frame, black content area center, BOTF style, dramatic lighting, professional game quality
batch_prompts.romulan_panel_frame: Romulan Star Empire game UI panel frame, 800x600 resolution, elegant sweeping curved bronze-gold frame, emerald green accent lines with soft glow, sophisticated Art Deco styling, Romulan bird-of-prey wing motifs in corners, green nebula visible through frame, polished metal texture, black content area center, BOTF style, refined and secretive aesthetic
batch_prompts.federation_panel_frame: Federation LCARS game UI panel frame, 800x600 resolution, classic Star Trek TNG style, thick orange and tan rounded bars on left side, purple and blue pill-shaped segments, characteristic elbow corners, multi-colored data displays, pure black content area, crisp clean design, authentic LCARS aesthetic
batch_prompts.cardassian_panel_frame: Cardassian Union game UI panel frame, 800x600 resolution, military efficiency design, amber-orange and brown color scheme, geometric shapes, surveillance display aesthetic, status monitoring elements, Cardassian geometric patterns, black content area center
batch_prompts.borg_panel_frame: Borg Collective game UI panel frame, 800x600 resolution, cold technological horror aesthetic, hexagonal honeycomb patterns, green glow on black, data streams, no organic elements, assimilation aesthetic, pure efficiency
